use_cases: Displaying notifications and alerts to users
Confirming user actions with close functionality
Showing additional content or forms in an overlay
Providing alerts that pause main content until dismissed
Implementing accessible modal dialogs with focus management
ai_summary: A clean, accessible modal dialog component built on Base UI that displays centered overlay content with a semi-transparent backdrop. Features smooth scale and opacity transitions on open/close, dark mode support, and proper focus management. Includes title, description, trigger button, and close functionality with keyboard accessibility.
